name: pragma-2-design-context-mvp
description: Pragma 2.0 MVP CLI for design context packages.

scripts.sample:ingest: node src/cli.js design ingest --input examples/figma-mcp-input --repo examples/repo --force
scripts.sample:pack-from-figma-capture: node src/cli.js design pack-from-figma-capture --input examples/figma-mcp-input --repo examples/repo --force --threshold-mb 20
